name: HubSpot CRM Custom Objects
description:
API for managing custom object records in HubSpot's CRM. Custom objects allow you to store data that doesn't fit into standard CRM objects (contacts, companies, deals, tickets). Requires Enterprise tier.

For schema management (creating/updating custom object definitions), see the CRM Schemas API.
